hero.subheadline: Ihe odide halal abụghị naanị akara okpukpe — ọ bụ akara nke àgwà, ọcha na mmepụta atụ egwu nke a nabatara n'ụwa niile. Mepee azụmaahịa gị n'akụ ụwa nke halal nke dọla tiriliọn 3.
